name: debbiedavidapp
description: Two-person German<->English live speech translator - Electron shell over the Python bridge.
author: Paidia

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: DebbieDavidApp listens to the two clip-on microphones to translate the conversation in real time.
extendInfo.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: DebbieDavidApp plays the translated audio to your Bluetooth earbuds.
